narrative: {"title":"EU employees","intro":"In response to your request for information under Article 7 of the EU Pay Transparency Directive, please find a summary of your current pay, the criteria used to determine pay and progression, and comparative information for employees in comparable roles.","sections":[{"heading":"Criteria for Pay Determination:","intro":"Pay for this role is determined based on the following objective, gender-neutral criteria:","bullets":["Relevant experience and tenure in the role","Educational qualifications and/or professional certifications","Demonstrated skills and performance in line with role requirements","Market benchmarking and internal pay equity"]},{"heading":"Pay Progression Criteria:","intro":"Employees progress through the pay band based on:","bullets":["Annual performance evaluations","Skills development and training completed","Additional responsibilities or contributions to team objectives"]},{"heading":"Comparative Pay Information:","paragraphs":["Employees in comparable roles (same job level, responsibilities, and location) receive gross annual compensation.
